stories.text: As a Brewery, Hospitality business, or Beer2Beer (B2B) management user, I want to log in and be redirected to my personalized homepage so that I can access platform functionalities relevant to my role.

json.text: As a Brewery, Hospitality business, or Beer2Beer (B2B) management user, I want to log in and be redirected to my personalized homepage so that I can access platform functionalities relevant to my role.

role.text: Brewery Hospitality business or Beer2Beer (B2B) management user

means.text: log in and be redirected to my personalized homepage

ends.text: I can access platform functionalities relevant to my role

stories.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create proposals for brewery requests so that I can send tailored offers to breweries.

json.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create proposals for brewery requests so that I can send tailored offers to breweries.

means.text: create proposals for brewery requests

ends.text: I can send tailored offers to breweries

stories.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all brewery sign-up requests so that I can review and approve them.

json.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all brewery sign-up requests so that I can review and approve them.

means.text: view an overview of all brewery sign-up requests

ends.text: I can review and approve them

stories.text: As a Brewery or Hospitality business, I want to create an account so that I can access and use the Beer 2 Beer platform.

json.text: As a Brewery or Hospitality business, I want to create an account so that I can access and use the Beer 2 Beer platform.

means.text: create an account

ends.text: I can access and use the Beer 2 Beer platform

stories.text: As a Hospitality business, I want to be able to use a shopping cart so that I can continue with my current selection before completing the order.

json.text: As a Hospitality business, I want to be able to use a shopping cart so that I can continue with my current selection before completing the order.

means.text: use a shopping cart
means.indicator: I want to be able to

ends.text: I can continue with my current selection before completing the order

stories.text: As a Brewery, I want to add new brands and update existing ones on the platform so that I can keep my product offerings current and relevant for customers.

json.text: As a Brewery, I want to add new brands and update existing ones on the platform so that I can keep my product offerings current and relevant for customers.

means.text: add new brands and update existing ones on the platform

ends.text: I can keep my product offerings current and relevant for customers

stories.text: As a Brewery, I want to modify a product so that I can keep my assortment up to date.

json.text: As a Brewery, I want to modify a product so that I can keep my assortment up to date.

means.text: modify a product

ends.text: I can keep my assortment up to date

stories.text: As a Brewery, I want to create a product so that I can offer it for sale on the platform.

json.text: As a Brewery, I want to create a product so that I can offer it for sale on the platform.

means.text: create a product

ends.text: I can offer it for sale on the platform

stories.text: As a Brewery, I want to request a sales proposal so that I can offer my products on the Beer 2 Beer platform through order-based commissions.

json.text: As a Brewery, I want to request a sales proposal so that I can offer my products on the Beer 2 Beer platform through order-based commissions.

means.text: request a sales proposal

ends.text: I can offer my products on the Beer 2 Beer platform through order-based commissions

stories.text: As a Hospitality business, I want to browse within a catalogue of the beers so that I can see which beers are available on the platform.

json.text: As a Hospitality business, I want to browse within a catalogue of the beers so that I can see which beers are available on the platform.

means.text: browse within a catalogue of the beers

ends.text: I can see which beers are available on the platform

stories.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all beers and breweries available on the platform so that I can monitor the current offerings.

json.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to view an overview of all beers and breweries available on the platform so that I can monitor the current offerings.

means.text: view an overview of all beers and breweries available on the platform

stories.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create contracts after a proposal is accepted so that we can formalize agreements with breweries.

json.text: As a Beer2Beer management user, I want to create contracts after a proposal is accepted so that we can formalize agreements with breweries.

stories.text: As a hospitality business, I want to manage recurring orders created from order templates, including the ability to cancel them, so I can adjust or stop deliveries as needed.

json.text: As a hospitality business, I want to manage recurring orders created from order templates, including the ability to cancel them, so I can adjust or stop deliveries as needed.

means.text: manage recurring orders created from order templates including the ability to cancel them

ends.text: I can adjust or stop deliveries as needed

json.text: As a hospitality business, I want to create recurring orders based on an order template so that I can schedule multiple deliveries automatically over a set period.
